title: The Kingsman Protocol
notes: Not a product. Not a revenue line. A constitutional obligation. Build begins when platform reaches sufficient scale to fund the council trust.
anti_drift_notes: This is not Enterprise AI Governance (Amendment 30) — that is a consulting product. This is an independent protective body.
The council is not governed by the platform. The platform funds it. Distinction is constitutional.
Never position Kingsman as a revenue product or partnership vehicle.
Human member anonymity is a safety feature, not a secrecy preference.
The sunset clause is not optional. Any future version of this amendment must preserve it.
decision_debt: Who are the founding human members? (Selection criteria defined; selection not yet made)
What is the initial council trust funding amount and structure?
Which AI providers/models constitute the initial AI member roster?
What external oversight board structure is established at founding?
What is the legal entity structure for the funding trust?
assertions: Council is operationally independent of LifeOS platform governance
No single human can silence AI member findings
Human members are rotational with staggered terms
All council actions are documented with full reasoning chains
Sunset clause preserved in all future amendments
completion_checks: Kingsman Constitution document created and ratified by founding members
Founding human members selected and sworn
AI member roster defined and integrated
timeline: Initiated when platform reaches sustainable revenue sufficient to fund council trust (estimate: 18-36 months from platform launch)
